zh.lifeSummary: Mary Miller於1605年出生在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可。她於1617年與John Twigg Hodges "Captain"在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可哈爾斯托結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1693年3月11日在美國麻薩諸塞州素福爾可波斯頓享年88歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mary Miller于1605年出生在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可。她于1617年与John Twigg Hodges "Captain"在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可哈爾斯托结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1693年3月11日在美国马萨诸塞州素福爾可波斯頓享年88岁。

nameMeanings.name: Miller
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name for a miller. The standard modern vocabulary word represents the northern Middle English term miller, an agent derivative of mille ‘mill’, reinforced by Old Norse mylnari (see Milner ). In southern, western, and central England Millward (literally, ‘mill keeper’) was the usual term. In North America, the surname Miller has absorbed many cognate surnames from other languages, for example German Müller (see Mueller ), Dutch Mulder and Molenaar , French Meunier , Italian Molinaro , Spanish Molinero , Hungarian Molnár (see Molnar ), Slovenian, Croatian, and Serbian Mlinar , Polish Młynarz or Młynarczyk (see Mlynarczyk ). Miller (including in the senses below) is the seventh most frequent surname in the US.

South German, Swiss German, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of Müller ‘miller’ (see Mueller ) and, in North America, also an altered form of this. This form of the surname is also found in other European countries, notably in Poland, Denmark, France (mainly Alsace and Lorraine), and Czechia; compare 3 below.
Americanized form of Polish, Czech, Croatian, Serbian, and Slovenian   Miler   ‘miller’, a surname of German origin.

variants.name: Millar
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Miller  . It is also found in Ireland (especially Antrim).

variants.name: Mueller
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Hans, Erwin, Fritz, Gerhard, Klaus, Heinz, Helmut, Wolfgang, Manfred, Horst.

German (mainly Müller) and Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Müller); Dutch: occupational name for a miller, Middle High German müller, German Müller. In Germany, Müller, Mueller is the most frequent of all surnames; in the US it is often changed to Miller or appears as Muller . See also Mulder .

variants.name: Milner
meanings: English (northern, especially Yorkshire): variant of Miller , retaining the -n- of the Middle English word milnere ‘miller’.

variants.name: Millward
meanings: English (mainly West Midlands): occupational name from Middle English milne-ward, mille-ward ‘keeper of a mill, miller’ (Old English mylen-weard). In southern England and the West Midlands this was a standard medieval term for a miller. Compare Miller .

variants.name: McMiller
meanings: Scottish: patronymic from the occupational byname   Miller  .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: Mary Miller was born in 1605, in Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States. She married John Twigg Hodges "Captain" in 1617, in Charlestown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 11 March 1693, in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, United States, at the age of 88.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Millerは1605年にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスで生まれた。1617年にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスチャーレストウンでJohn Twigg Hodges "Captain"と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1693年3月11日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州スフォルクボストンで88歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Miller(은)는 1605년 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1617년 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 찰레스타운에서 John Twigg Hodges "Captain"(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1693년 3월 11일 미국 매사추세츠 주 수폴크 보스턴에서 88세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Mary Miller родилась в 1605 г. в местности миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Twigg Hodges "Captain" в 1617 г. в местности чарльстоун, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 11 марта 1693 г. в местности бостон, суффолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 88 лет.
